event.name: F1 Bahrain Grand Prix 2026 — Season Opener

context.pre_match_notes: Season opener. New regulation cycle — 2026 regulation changes (new power unit formula). Season favourite qualified P1 but margin smaller than in previous regulations. Bahrain: medium-speed circuit, tire degradation critical. Qualifying delta 0.2s at medium-speed circuit — moderate signal, not as strong as Silverstone.

question: Predict race winner. How does circuit type (medium-speed) affect the qualifying delta signal reliability?

verified_outcome.key_variable: qualifying_delta positive but moderate — 0.2s at medium circuit is MEDIUM confidence, not HIGH
